title: RYSONS BINGO DABBERS 4 PC | Bingo Marker 4 Colours
features: Easily keep track of your bingo game
description: Product Description Rysons Bingo Dabbers 4 pc These Bingo Dabbers 4 Pcs by Rysons are a must-have for any bingo player! Play to win by upgrading your bingo game with these fantastic, vibrant daubers! Easily keep track of your game and mark off the winning numbers! Each pack contains 4 colours: red, blue, green & orange. The brilliant colours allow great visibility of your cards and look great! Plus, made with functionality in mind the dabbers supply a controlled and precise flow of ink, allowing you to accurately dab numbers without smudges or mistakes. The quick-drying ink is also a great feature of these pens, keeping your card neat.
